form.formComment: Last start finished 7th over 400m at Warragul beaten 10 lengths (23.25) behind Hara Hachi Bu in a Mix 3/4 on March 24. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 7th over 400m at Warragul beaten 10 lengths (23.25) behind Hara Hachi Bu in a Mix 3/4 on March 24. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2.75 lengths third (22.33) over 390m at Ballarat. Has a strong record from box 2, including seven wins. Go close.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 400m at Warragul. Looking to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turning out of back straight.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start by 0.8 lengths at The Meadows (30.25) beating Aston Policy in a Grade 5 FIN on March 28. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by one length at this track over 435m (24.59) beating Paw Callie in Grade 5 on March 29. Has a fast 24.49 PB at this course and distance. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Impressive performance leading throughout to score by 2.75 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a hot 24.35 for the 435m trip. Harder here but will be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 6 length fifth (25.00) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Rates well on best and expect a better run this time.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (24.68) at big odds over 435m at this track. Drawn wide. Worth including.
